title: phyllanthus orbicularis
intro: Phyllanthus orbicularis, also known as the oval leaf phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus orbicularis include its potential to aid in the treatment of liver diseases, improve immune function, and reduce oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine.
